name: P90 | 日落百合
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been spray-painted with a pattern of orange lilies. While beautiful, lilies are most often associated with death
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 枪身喷涂着橙色百合花。 美丽，但致命
